meta.dc:title: Powers and duties of board of library trustees; establishment

section.heading: Powers and duties of board of library trustees; establishment

content.p: There shall be a board of library trustees consisting of five (5) members. The board of library trustees shall have the power and duty to:
Adopt such rules and regulations as it may deem necessary for the administration and protection of the city library.
Act in an advisory capacity to the council in all matters pertaining to the city library.
Consider provisions of the annual budget for library purposes during the process of the preparation of the budget, and make recommendations with respect thereto to the city manager and the council.
Assist in the planning of the library program for the inhabitants of the city, and promote and stimulate public interest therein.
Accept money, personal property, or real estate donated to the city for library purposes, subject to the approval of the council.
Contract with school, county or other government agencies to render or receive library services or facilities subject to the approval of the council.
